zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Eyre II於1422年出生在英國德比夏爾瑟 帕德利時，他的父親Robert Eyre I26歲，母親Joanna Padley22歲。他於1457年與Elizabeth FitzWilliam結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1452年在英國英格蘭德比夏爾皮克 迪斯特利可特享年30歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭德比夏爾哈黑薩。

nameMeanings.name: Eyre
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: This name was that of a historically prominent family in Galway (Ireland) since the 1650s.

variants.name: Ayer
meanings: English and Scottish: from Middle English eir, eyr ‘heir’ (Anglo-Norman French heyr, Old French (h)eir, Latin heres). Forms such as Richard le Heyer were frequent in Middle English, denoting a man who was well known to be the heir to the main property in a particular locality, either one who had already inherited or one with great expectations.
English: from the Anglo-Norman French and Middle English personal name Aier (ancient Germanic Agihari).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Eyre II was born in 1422, in Nether Padley, Derbyshire, England, his father, Robert Eyre I, was 26 and his mother, Joanna Padley, was 22. He married Elizabeth FitzWilliam in 1457. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1452, in Peak District, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 30, and was buried in Hathersage, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Eyre II est né en 1422, à Nether Padley, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert Eyre I, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Joanna Padley, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth FitzWilliam en 1457. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1452, à Peak District, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 30 ans, et a été enterré à Hathersage, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Eyre II 1422 in Nether Padley, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Eyre I 26 und seine Mutter Joanna Padley 22. Er hat 1457 Elizabeth FitzWilliam geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1452 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Peak District, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Hathersage, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Elizabeth FitzWilliam nel 1457. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Robert Eyre IIが1422年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアネスエル プアドリーで生まれた時，父Robert Eyre Iは26歳，母Joanna Padleyは22歳であった。1457年にElizabeth FitzWilliamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1452年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアピーク ディストリクトで30歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアハスエルサッジにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Eyre II(이)가 1422년 영국 더비실르 네터 파들리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Eyre I(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Joanna Padley(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1457년 Elizabeth FitzWilliam(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1452년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 피크 디스트릭트에서 30세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 하더사지에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Eyre II родился в 1422 г. в местности нетир падли, дирбишир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Eyre I было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Joanna Padley, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth FitzWilliam в 1457 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1452 г. в местности пик дистрикт, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 30 лет и был похоронен в местности хатирсадж, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания.
